acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Benicia PD and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harrassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy:
All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.

Sharing

Data will only be shared with other law enforcement agencies for law enforcement purposes only, and never for immigration or other usages that are prohibited under Benicia PD policy.
Usage

Data retention (in days)

30 days

Number of LPR and other cameras

52
